Lumify
Table of Contents

Namespace lumify.api.Models.EF

Classes

ChatMessage

A single chat message in a room. Persisted by ChatHub and read back via ChatController. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

EmailVerificationToken

A single-use token backing an e-mail verification link. Only the hash of the token is stored (same approach as PasswordResetToken), so a leaked row cannot be turned back into a working link.

Event

A calendar event, either personal (WorkspaceID null) or workspace-shared. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

Folder

A folder that organizes notes, either personal or workspace-shared. Folders can be nested via ParentFolderID. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

Friendship

A relationship between two users (friend request or accepted friendship). Stored once per user pair using ordered UserLowID/UserHighID keys; the requester/addressee fields record who initiated it. See FriendshipService.

Note

A note container, either personal or workspace-shared, optionally filed in a folder. Its body is an ordered list of modules (text blocks and link items). Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

NoteAttachment

A file attached to a note. Stores the upload metadata and the name under which the file is stored on disk. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

Note_LinkItem

A link item module within a note — a labelled URL. Ordered within the note via NotePos. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

Note_TextBlock

A text block module within a note (e.g. paragraph, heading or code block). Ordered within the note via NotePos. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

PasswordResetToken

A single-use token backing a password-reset link. Only the hash of the token is stored, so a leaked row cannot be turned back into a working reset link.

TodoEntry

A single item within a TodoList. Toggling its status keeps the parent list's status in sync. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

TodoList

A todo list, either personal or workspace-shared, holding a set of TodoEntry items. Its status is derived from its entries (done when all entries are done). Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

User

A registered user account. The central entity most other content references via its owner. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt; timestamps are stored as ISO-8601 strings.

Workspace

A shared space that groups content (folders, notes, todo lists, events) and members. Content belongs to the workspace, not its creator. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

WorkspaceMember

Join entity linking a User to a Workspace with a role. A removed membership is soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

Enums

Role

The role of a User, persisted to the database by name.

Made with docfx
